allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''./data/products.json''\); console.log\(''Total:'', d.length\); const p = d[0]; console.log\(''Shops:'', JSON.stringify\(p.shops, null, 2\)\); console.log\(''Badge:'', p.badge\); console.log\(''Specs keys:'', Object.keys\(p.specs || {}\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''./data/products.json''\); const s = p[0]; console.log\(''imageUrl:'', s.imageUrl\); console.log\(''previewUrl:'', s.previewUrl\); console.log\(''---''\); const s2 = p[10]; console.log\(''iPhone 16 Pro Max imageUrl:'', s2.imageUrl?.substring\(0,80\)\); console.log\(''iPhone 16 Pro Max previewUrl:'', s2.previewUrl?.substring\(0,80\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''./data/products.json''\); console.log\(''Total products:'', p.length\); console.log\(''Categories:'', [...new Set\(p.map\(x=>x.category\)\)].join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''Sample imageUrls:''\); p.slice\(0,5\).forEach\(x => console.log\(x.id, x.name, x.imageUrl?.substring\(0,80\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''./data/products.json''\); console.log\(''Last ID:'', Math.max\(...p.map\(x=>+x.id\)\)\); const s = p[0]; console.log\(JSON.stringify\({shops: s.shops, specs: s.specs, badge: s.badge, priceHistory: s.priceHistory.slice\(0,2\)}, null, 2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''./data/products.json''\); const cats = [...new Set\(p.map\(x=>x.category\)\)]; console.log\(''Categories:'', cats\); console.log\(''Total:'', p.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const products = require\(''./data/products.json''\); const categories = {}; products.forEach\(function\(p\) { if \(!\(p.category in categories\)\) categories[p.category] = { count: 0, specKeys: {} }; categories[p.category].count++; Object.keys\(p.specs || {}\).forEach\(function\(k\) { if \(!\(k in categories[p.category].specKeys\)\) categories[p.category].specKeys[k] = 0; categories[p.category].specKeys[k]++; }\); }\); Object.entries\(categories\).forEach\(function\(e\) { var cat = e[0], info = e[1]; console.log\(''--- '' + cat + '' \('' + info.count + '' products\) ---''\); Object.entries\(info.specKeys\).sort\(function\(a,b\) { return b[1]-a[1]; }\).forEach\(function\(e2\) { console.log\(''  '' + e2[0] + '': '' + e2[1]\); }\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''./data/products.json''\); const cats = {}; p.forEach\(x => { cats[x.category] = \(cats[x.category] || 0\) + 1; }\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(cats, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''./data/products.json''\); const cats = {}; p.forEach\(x => { cats[x.category] = \(cats[x.category]||0\)+1; }\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(cats, null, 2\)\); console.log\(''Total:'', p.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const src = require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''constants/mock-data.ts'', ''utf8''\); const catMatches = [...src.matchAll\(/category: ''\([^'']+\)''/g\)].map\(m => m[1]\); const cats = [...new Set\(catMatches\)].sort\(\); const allCats = [''Smartphones'',''Tablets'',''Laptops'',''Desktops'',''Monitoren'',''Televisies'',''Audio'',''Gameconsoles'',''Gaming'',''Netwerk'',''Fotografie'',''Huishoudelijk'',''Wearables'',''Grafische kaarten'',''Processors'',''Moederborden'',''Geheugen'',''Opslag \(SSD\)'',''Opslag \(HDD\)'',''Voedingen'',''Computerbehuizingen'',''CPU-koelers'',''Ventilatoren'',''Toetsenborden'',''Muizen'',''Webcams'',''Luidsprekers'',''Printers'',''Kabels & Adapters'']; const missing = allCats.filter\(c => !cats.includes\(c\)\); console.log\(''Categories:'', cats.length, ''| Missing:'', missing.length > 0 ? missing.join\('', ''\) : ''None''\); const perCat = {}; catMatches.forEach\(c => { perCat[c] = \(perCat[c] || 0\) + 1; }\); Object.entries\(perCat\).sort\(\).forEach\(\([k,v]\) => console.log\(''  '' + k + '': '' + v\)\);")
